privileged_info_summary: The task operates on a synthetically modified variant of the public-domain eCRM-001 OpenVSP aircraft geometry. Setup scripts dynamically randomize the initial wing span and horizontal tail X-location at runtime, making the starting state unique per session. The target Horizontal Tail Volume Coefficient (target_vh) of 1.10 explicitly matches the task description requirements and the mathematical validation logic in verifier.py.
